title: EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER - 211info
text: ALLEN TEMPLE EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pre-made food boxes and clothing assistance. Accepts donations of peanut butter, toilet paper, paper towels, and socks. 4214 NE 8th Avenue Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday/Saturday 11am-2pm. Closed first week of every month. (503) 284-1010 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 284-1010 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Clients may visit once a month. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland (North/Northeast only, from N Interstate Avenue to NE 82nd Avenue and N Columbia Boulevard to E Burnside Street). Serves clients from outside designated geographic area on a one-time, emergency basis only. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The pantry and clothing closet is located in the house next to the church. Services: Cleaning Product Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALLEN TEMPLE EMERGENCY AIDE CENTER
